justification: All three input sources (Bird, MJ, Pippen) are represented. Both domain rules preserved with exact values: $0.01 floor and >= 10 quantity threshold. All 3 ACs present with exact values (4.50, 5.00, 0.01). Pippen's operational notes explicitly included: high-traffic context (500 req/sec), JSDoc requirement stated as an explicit architectural decision (not optional), and unit tests specified in AC4. The $0.01 floor is labeled as a domain invariant in domain_rules and in terminology_alignment as 'price floor'.
